items.headline: Energy storage demand grows 40% annually, lithium producers bet on growth drivers beyond electric vehicles
items.snippet: In the next two years, the distribution of lithium demand between electric vehicles and energy storage will be more balanced. Albemarle noted that demand for its energy storage business is steadily growing.

items.headline: Lithium mining stocks broadly fall, Albemarle down over 4%
items.snippet: On Thursday, lithium mining stocks broadly fell. ALB down over 4%, SQM down 3%, SGML down over 2%, LAR down nearly 1%.

items.headline: Albemarle, the biggest beneficiary of expanding lithium demand - Investment opinion Buy - Citi
items.snippet: Citi upgraded Albemarle to Buy, PT $225. Market is underestimating Albemarle growth potential. Global ESS battery production to reach ~950 GWh in 2026 (+35% YoY) and ~1,300 GWh by 2027.

items.headline: Does Albemarle Premium Valuation Justify Buying the Stock Now?
items.snippet: ALB expects lithium demand CAGR of 10-20% from 2025 to 2030. Global ESS production rose 117% YoY in Q1 2026. Lithium prices have rebounded from trough levels. ALB generated operating cash flow of $346M and FCF of $248M in Q1.

items.headline: Albemarle Likely to Continue Growing Volumes Over the Coming Years, RBC Says
items.snippet: Albemarle is likely to continue growing volumes over the coming years from mostly brownfield at Wodgina, Atacama productivity, and opportunities at its Kings Mountain and Antofalla hubs. RBC raised PT to $257, reiterated outperform.
